title: Top Farming Vlog YouTube Channels
description: Live ranking of 34 farming vlog channels, fetched 2026-07-12 - subscribers, videos, countries, 6 with public contacts.
answer_first: As of July 12, 2026, 34 farming vlog channels make this ranking, led by The Urban Rescue Ranch at 3,410,000 subscribers. The median channel has 11,850 subscribers, and 6 of the 34 expose a public business contact. This ranking starts its history on 2026-07-12: the baseline capture holds 34 channels. Below, every channel is ranked with subscribers, videos, country, and a public-contact flag.
rows: O’Neill Dairy Farm - Irish Family Farming Channel
facts: The ranking holds 34 channels totaling 6,195,860 subscribers as of 2026-07-12.

A public business contact is listed by 6 of the 34 channels - reported here strictly as a count.
Total output across the ranking: 20,124 videos from 34 channels.
15 of 34 channels are based in United States, the most common country.
Baseline established 2026-07-12 with 34 channels; deltas start at the next refresh.

faq.q: Where does this channel data come from?
faq.a: From public YouTube channel pages, collected in one automated run on 2026-07-12 for the keyword 'farming vlog'. The 34 qualifying channels are ranked purely by subscriber count.

faq.q: Does this page include creator emails?
faq.a: No. Contact information never appears here; the page states only that 6 of the 34 channels expose a public business contact. The source actor, run by you, returns what each channel publishes.

faq.q: What is the median audience size here?
faq.a: 11,850 subscribers across the 34 ranked channels, while the top channel holds 3,410,000. Half the field sits below that median line.

faq.q: When was this list last refreshed?
faq.a: The data shown was captured 2026-07-12 - see the provenance line. Refreshes rewrite this exact page with newly scraped statistics for the 34-channel field.
